title: WaldoPage
description: One Hidden Search page: entity manifest rendered deterministically from bundled assets. Workers generate DATA only. Canvas is fixed 3200x1000 logical px; x/y are entity centers; interactive entities keep y >= 180 (top-strip exclusion).

scale.description: Rendered artwork width in logical px (artwork is square, so height == width). Tier minimums: T1>=140 T2>=120 T3>=100 T4>=90 T5>=80.

occlusion_pct.description: Percent of target bbox covered by entities with z_layer 3-4 (target and decoys implicitly render at z_layer 2). Validator recomputes; tier budgets: T1-2=0, T3<=15, T4<=25, T5<=30.

decoys.description: Look-alike species placed within 600 logical px of the target, drawn from the lead-authored similarity table. Never the target species.

entities.description: Everything else rendered on the page (crowd Pokemon, NPCs, props). Render list = entities + decoys + target.

asset_id.description: pokemon:<bundled id> | npc:<registry name> | prop:<registry name>. Validator cross-checks against the allow-list and the prop/NPC registry.

density.description: Worker's self-reported counts; validator recomputes and must agree.

crowd.description: pokemon + npc count incl. decoys and target

hint_text.description: Kid-friendly location clue, positive tone, spoken by TTS. E.g. 'Look near the boats by the pier!'

math_hook.description: OPTIONAL (tiers 3-5). Template PARAMETERS only — the app instantiates the actual question from the existing math template engine. Workers never write question text.

max.description: Largest operand/answer magnitude for the template.

bbox.description: [x, y, w, h] top-left corner + size, logical px. Must equal [cx - scale/2, cy - scale/2, scale, scale] for square artwork (validator recomputes).

bundledSpeciesId.description: Pokedex id with bundled official-artwork (public/sprites/manifest.json spriteIds).
